[DQC.US.0109.9566] The concept us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 with value 0.427 should always be used with the ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis and ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis. This element has no meaning without these axis at a minimum. Any data provided needs to be used in combination with an additional axis to define the actual risk as the numerator. The member used on the ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis represents the benchmark denominator. If this value represents the Concentration Risk, Threshold Percentage then use the extension element ConcentrationRiskThresholdPercentage.
The properties of this us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 fact are:
Period :2023-09-01 to 2024-08-31 Dimensions : srt:MajorCustomersAxis=www.dsny.com:OneCustomerMember Unit : pure
Rule Element Id:9566 Rule version: 29.0.2 - DSNY_instance_2024_2025.xml 3235

[DQC.US.0109.9566] The concept us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 with value 0.419 should always be used with the ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis and ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis. This element has no meaning without these axis at a minimum. Any data provided needs to be used in combination with an additional axis to define the actual risk as the numerator. The member used on the ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis represents the benchmark denominator. If this value represents the Concentration Risk, Threshold Percentage then use the extension element ConcentrationRiskThresholdPercentage.
The properties of this us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 fact are:
Period :2022-09-01 to 2023-08-31 Dimensions : srt:MajorCustomersAxis=www.dsny.com:OneCustomerMember Unit : pure
